We strongly recommend limiting your gift cards to specific fiscal hosts - otherwise, malicious users could create fake Collectives to withdraw the funds. Collectives under trusted fiscal hosts have all been vetted and confirmed as legitimate.

Credit card payments incur processor fees, which can add up on large campaigns. Banks may also flag the numerous transactions as suspicious. We strongly recommend adding a prepaid budget via bank transfer instead. <SupportLink>Contact us</SupportLink> to learn more.

Open Collective doesn't store sensitive payment data (e.g. Credit Card numbers), instead relying on our payment processor, Stripe, a secure solution that is widely adopted. If our systems are compromised, your payment information is not at risk, because we simply don't store it. <LearnMoreLink>Learn more</LearnMoreLink>.
